text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Now that we've decided to rethink<n>our project...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We call a meeting with all the<n>students who've
joined our cause,<n>but...

text_block_list.name: Supporter A
text_block_list.text: Er, my friend said she's busy today.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Okay, thank you for letting me know.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Right. I'm sure you're all wondering<n>why we
called you here.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Well, we want to take another look at<n>what the
Grand Concert means to<n>everyone.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
As for myself, I've always viewed it<n>as a chance
for all runners to convey<n>their gratitude.
Meanwhile...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I see it as a unique chance to do<n>things we
couldn't do in a winning<n>concert.

text_block_list.name: Supporter A
text_block_list.text: What kind of things?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Well... I'm not really sure yet.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Oh dear, have the deliberations begunwithout me?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Tachyon...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
There's something you're keeping a<n>secret from
us, isn't there, Hello?

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: A secret? What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
About your past. How you used to be<n>a backup
dancer?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: She told us about that while you were<n>gone.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Did she now! For free? You're telling<n>me my deal
with Shakur was for<n>nothing?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well that's a disappointment... I<n>suppose you've
heard about the one<n>she admired so dearly too,
then?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Who?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Ohoho? The curious look on your<n>face
suggests otherwise.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I see... Tell us, then, Hello—you had<n>someone you
looked up to very<n>much, didn't you?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Someone just like you, who retired<n>without ever
attaining center stage.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Hello's Upperclassman
text_block_list.text:
Heh, absolutely dazzling, wasn't I?<n>...As a backup
dancer, like always.

text_block_list.name: Hello's Upperclassman
text_block_list.text:
The people cheering for me... they'll<n>cheer for me
no matter where on<n>stage I'm standing. I owe it to
them to<n>always give 100%, no matter what.

text_block_list.name: Hello's Upperclassman
text_block_list.text:
I was going to win... and sing my<n>thanks to them...
Today was<n>supposed to be the day!

text_block_list.name: Hello's Upperclassman
text_block_list.text: Why... why can't I just—

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: ...Yes, I did. She was brilliant.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: And how did you feel about her?

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Well, I wanted to see her center<n>stage, but... in the
end, she didn't<n>make it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Haha! How very egotistical of you!<n>Yes, it's just
as I predicted!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Egotistical...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Why, aren't you just exceptional!<n>And in an
entirely different way than<n>Suzuka! You will make
the ultimate<n>sample of a fan!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: A fan?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Um, Hello... what does the Grand<n>Concert mean to
you?

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: It means... Well, um...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I want you to answer not as a runner,<n>but as a fan.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I've... realized that concerts mean<n>different things
depending on who<n>you are and where you
stand—on or<n>off the stage.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Up until now, I always thought of<n>concerts as a
space to convey the<n>gratitude I feel when racing.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
As long as I got that across, as long<n>as I
performed, that was enough for<n>me.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: But I was wrong.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Now I know that concerts are a space<n>for me to be
"welcomed home" by my<n>fans.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Concerts mean something different to<n>everyone.
I'm sure our fans see<n>them differently from us.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: H-hold on. Sorry, this is a lot to take in<n>all at once!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: I, um...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
...You were a fan, weren't you? You<n>wanted to
see that special someone<n>on stage.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Am I wrong?

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: N-no, you're... you're right. I see...

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
(Please, if there's anyone listening up<n>there, don't
let her tears be shed in<n>vain.)

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
(Because if she just had a chance, I<n>know it'd be
a magical concert like no<n>other...)

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
I just wanted to see her up there...<n>That's all I
ever wanted.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...What's this? Did you only now<n>realize where
you stand?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well, never mind. The real experiment<n>is about to
begin!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
What I seek is empirical proof of the<n>potential
generated by a concert.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The potential not to exceed limits, but<n>to expand
them. If we are to<n>continually reach for the
untrodden<n>and the unknown, then we must<n>make
investments in our futures like<n>this!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Should you attempt to reach the<n>domain that lies
beyond on your own,<n>you may exceed your
"limits."

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Now then, let the experiment begin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We now know what the Grand<n>Concert means to
the students, but<n>what about the fans?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That is the next question we must<n>tackle.
